meta.title: CreatorStack AI Playground
meta.author: Fellyph Cintra
meta.description: A local WordPress Playground setup for testing CreatorStack AI.

siteOptions.blogdescription: Disposable WordPress site for plugin testing

steps.code:
<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

if ( ! defined( 'WTTBA_VERSION' ) ) {
	throw new Exception( 'CreatorStack AI did not load.' );
}

if ( ! class_exists( '\\WTTBA\\Plugin' ) ) {
	throw new Exception( 'CreatorStack AI plugin class is unavailable.' );
}
